MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Richard C. Ercoli (628-444-2208) appears as defendant/opposing party, In Propria Persona

No other apearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of defendant, Richard C. Ercoli is GRANTED IN ITS ENTIRETY. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
